title: Indian Health Service Clinics - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Indian Health Service Clinics 10 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BURNS PAIUTE TRIBE WADATIKA HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services. Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members or children of tribal members Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm, closed holidays (541) 573-8050 Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS HEALTH OFFICES HEALTHCARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers primary care, dental, radiology, optometry, mental health, and lab services. Also offers medical care related to domestic violence and sexual assault. 200 Gwee-Shut Road Siletz, OR 97380 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members, children of tribal members, and the general public. Dental care for tribal members only. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-5pm, Friday 10am-5pm (541) 444-1030 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF THE COOS, LOWER UMPQUA, AND SIUSLAW INDIANS THREE RIVERS HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services including a nurse advice line. Also has a pharmacy. 150 S Wall Street Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Tribal members of the Confederated Tribes of the Coos, Lower Umpqua and Siuslaw Indians and their widows/widowers Hours: Health Care Center Monday-Friday 7am-6pm Pharmacy: Monday-Friday 8am-1pm and 2pm-6pm, Saturday 8am-2pm Advice Nurse Line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 435-7200 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF WARM SPRINGS WARM SPRINGS HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER WARM SPRINGS INDIAN HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers primary care, dental, optometry, specialized medical care, WIC, nutrition information, maternal and child healthcare, and a diabetes program. Also offers a mobile medical bus on the Warm Springs Reservation only. 1270 Kot-Num Road Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: Members of a federally recognized American Indian or Alaskan Native tribe or children of tribal members only Hours: -Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Firday 8am-5pm, Wednesday 1pm-5pm -Mobile medical bus schedule varies, call for location and dates (541) 553-1196 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COQUILLE INDIAN TRIBE KO-KWEL WELLNESS CENTER COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services to individuals and families. COVID-19 vaccines available; brand is Spikevax which is manufactured by Moderna. 630 Miluk Drive Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members, children of tribal members, and residents of the community as capacity allows COVID-19 vaccinations: Tribal members, CIT employees, Kilkich residents, and KWC patients Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Vaccinations: Fridays by appointment Medical Helpline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 888-9494 1 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COW CREEK BAND OF UMPQUA TRIBE OF INDIANS COW CREEK HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary medical care including diabetes prevention, nutritional counseling, podiatry, medical massage, imaging, and vaccinations. 2589 NW Edenbower Boulevard Roseburg, OR 97471 Eligibility: Citizens of the Cow Creek Band of Umpqua Tribe of Indians, employees, and the general public Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 672-8533 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COW CREEK BAND OF UMPQUA TRIBE OF INDIANS COW CREEK HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER SOUTH CLINIC COW CREEK HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary medical care including diabetes prevention, nutritional counseling, podiatry, medical massage, imaging, and vaccinations. 480 Wartahoo Lane Canyonville, OR 97417 Eligibility: Citizens of the Cow Creek Band of Umpqua Tribe of Indians, employees, and the general public Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 672-8533 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GRAND RONDE HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER PRIMARY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services to the community. Services may include: general medical exams, eye exams, alternative medicine, women's annual exam, STD screening and treatment, pediatric care, vaccinations, and mental health evaluations. 9615 Grand Ronde Road Grand Ronde, OR 97347 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm, Thursday 9:30am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm Email (503) 879-2002 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH TRIBES KLAMATH TRIBAL WELLNESS CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides full service pharmacy, health, dental, drug and alcohol, public health nursing, health education services, and mental health services for tribal members. 330 Chiloquin Boulevard Chiloquin, OR 97624 Eligibility: American Indians/Alaska Natives from federally recognized tribes are eligible for direct services Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm (541) 882-1487 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YELLOWHAWK TRIBAL HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive physical, mental, and dental care services. Services include general exams, well-child exams, immunizations, care for illness or infections, prenatal care, comprehensive dental services, and counseling and drug and alcohol treatment services. 46314 Timine Way Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members or children of tribal members Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm Email (541) 966-9830 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS HEALTHCARE SERVICES CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF THE COOS, LOWER UMPQUA, AND SIUSLAW INDIANS THREE RIVERS HEALTH CENTER CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF WARM SPRINGS WARM SPRINGS INDIAN HEALTH CENTER COQUILLE INDIAN TRIBE COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER COW CREEK BAND OF UMPQUA TRIBE OF INDIANS COW CREEK HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER COW CREEK BAND OF UMPQUA TRIBE OF INDIANS COW CREEK HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER GRAND RONDE HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER PRIMARY CARE KLAMATH TRIBES KLAMATH TRIBAL WELLNESS CENTER YELLOWHAWK TRIBAL HEALTH CENTER YELLOWHAWK TRIBAL HEALTH CENTER
